{
  "organ": "DOCTRINARIUM_AGENT",
  "runner": "doctrinarium_agent_runner.py",
  "commands": [
    "status",
    "check",
    "where",
    "identity",
    "pack",
    "shell",
    "help",
    "law-list",
    "doctrine-check",
    "violation-report",
    "gate-before-work"
  ],
  "domain_commands": {
    "law-list": "List gate-law inventory from Doctrinarium registry.",
    "doctrine-check": "Check baseline doctrine files are present and accessible.",
    "violation-report": "Report forbidden-path or scope violations from git drift.",
    "gate-before-work": "Emit gate-before-work truth check requirements."
  },
  "shell_usage": "py -3 TOOLS/doctrinarium_agent_runner.py shell",
  "visual_status": "PASS_RICH",
  "warnings": []
}

domain_commands.law-list: List gate-law inventory from Doctrinarium registry.
domain_commands.doctrine-check: Check baseline doctrine files are present and accessible.
domain_commands.violation-report: Report forbidden-path or scope violations from git drift.
